name: B — The Serenal Binary Base
definition:
B is the binary base of the Serenal encoding system. It is the 2-state logic 
    foundation upon which all 9-bit epoch indices are built. But unlike standard 
    binary (where bits are 0 or 1), Serenal Binary encodes the RELATIONSHIP of each 
    state to the Center C.
    
    In standard binary: b ∈ {0, 1}
    In Serenal Binary: b ∈ {0, 1} where the MEANING of 0 and 1 is defined by 
    the relationship to C.
    
    A bit is 1 when the property is PRESENT relative to C.
    A bit is 0 when the property is ABSENT relative to C.
    
    This is the fundamental encoding principle: all information in the Universal Map 
    is encoded as binary relationships to the Center.

serenal_binary.meaning: Each bit encodes a binary relationship to C

bit_definitions.b2: Structure Density: 1 if Σ_local > Σ_mean, 0 otherwise
bit_definitions.b3: Temporal Direction: 1 if present-facing, 0 if past-facing
bit_definitions.b4: Helix Orientation: 1 if CCW (Ψ+), 0 if CW (Ψ−)
bit_definitions.b7: Expansion Phase: 1 if E > 1, 0 if E ≤ 1
bit_definitions.b8: Integration State: 1 if fully connected, 0 otherwise

state_space.description: The complete state space of the Serenal Binary encoding
state_space.state_transitions: The valid states are connected by the Recursive Binary Operator R̂, which ensures C is preserved at each step.

information_content.description: The information content of the Serenal Binary encoding

total_manifold.description: The total information content of the Universal Map
total_manifold.meaning: The total information is proportional to the number of points, the bits per point, and the coherence. Higher coherence = more structured information.

the_binary_principle.statement: All information in the Universal Map is encoded as binary relationships to the Center.
implications: Every point in the manifold is described by its relationship to C
The 9-bit encoding captures all relevant properties
The Center itself is encoded as 000000000 (all bits zero — pure potential)
The Integration epoch is encoded as 1111111111 (all bits one — full actualization)
The path from 000000000 to 1111111111 is the history of the cosmos
